Northwind Technologies reported record revenue on February 8, 2024, according to chief
executive David Martinez. The firm, based at 1200 Riverside Drive in Portland, acquired
Contoso Systems for an undisclosed sum. Emily Davis, who led the deal, previously worked at
Fabrikam Holdings and Tailspin Industries.

The transaction closed on March 22, 2024 after review by Wingtip Partners. Robert Williams,
general counsel at Northwind Technologies, said the integration of Contoso Systems would be
complete by December 1, 2024. The combined company will operate from 88 Lakeview Avenue in
Seattle and a second office at 410 Harbor Road in Oakland.

Analysts at Litware Group and Proseware Capital raised their estimates. Jennifer Brown,
a partner at Litware Group, noted that founder Thomas Anderson had built Contoso Systems
since June 3, 2015. Former director Patricia Garcia will join the board on April 10, 2024.
